disclaimers: This evaluator-only synthetic split is not an independent predictive split.
FROZEN_UNEXECUTED declarations are not executed results.
A declared target-form readout is not a durable TargetForm state.
Synthetic structural separation is not predictive or human-empirical support.
EpisodeIntegrationReceiptFixture and NarrativeTerrainFixture are declared simulation sources, not implemented human Episode or Narrative Field objects.
Supplied TargetForm sensitivity does not establish where a TargetForm comes from.
Source-compiler distinction does not establish downstream necessity or causal feedback.
Ghost candidate generation is not endorsement, adjudication, integration, rationality, recovery, or external truth.
Positive and negative directions are simulation labels, not health, valence, morality, or ground truth.
A challenger retirement decision is limited to the frozen synthetic fixture family and common target.
CH_DECLARED_RT_LOOKUP is an algebraic-alias evaluator negative control for CH_RT_CONGRUENCE and is not a ninth independent competing model family.
CONTRACT_ERROR from adapter shape mismatch must never be reported as a substantive model difference.
No D1 output may mutate runtime state, evidence, action, authority, world outcome, Episode material, or Narrative Field.
No-access and source-free controls prohibit invented encounter or candidate content.
Passing D1 would not establish actual mental time, MorphicLoad, recovery, mood law, or human mechanism.

retirement_results.disposition: Retire adopted Episode-integration source allowance from D1 if TF0 and TF1 readout profiles are equal on all eight fixtures; contested/accessibility diagnostics do not rescue it.
Retire implicit/plastic plus pre-access accessibility source allowance if TF1 and TF2 readout profiles are equal on all eight fixtures.
Retire the ReceptionState formation edge only if both E0=ER and ET=ERT on all eight fixtures.
Retire the supplied TargetForm formation edge only if both E0=ET and ER=ERT on all eight fixtures.
Retire Ghost target guidance only if both G0=GT and GP=GTP on all eight fixtures.
Retire declared Ghost program freedom only if both G0=GP and GT=GTP on all eight fixtures.

Reduce only the declared two-direction readout mapping to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire source lineage, contested/accessibility diagnostics, downstream necessity, or any durable TargetForm claim. This applies only if TF2 and CH_SOURCE_KIND_BLIND_MAX exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only the declared two-direction readout mapping to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire source lineage, contested/accessibility diagnostics, downstream necessity, or any durable TargetForm claim. This applies only if TF2 and CH_MATERIAL_COUNT_OR_MAX exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only emitted-status plus thresholded directional-eligibility readout to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire or equate formed-profile ranks, ambiguity, activation, intervention lineage, or a richer formation mechanism. This applies only if ERT and CH_FORMATION_BASE_ONLY exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only emitted-status plus thresholded directional-eligibility readout to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire or equate formed-profile ranks, ambiguity, activation, intervention lineage, or a richer formation mechanism. This applies only if ERT and CH_DOMINANT_DIRECTION exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only emitted-status plus thresholded directional-eligibility readout to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire or equate formed-profile ranks, ambiguity, activation, intervention lineage, or a richer formation mechanism. This applies only if ERT and CH_FIXED_RANK_ACTIVATION exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only emitted-status plus thresholded directional-eligibility readout to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire or equate formed-profile ranks, ambiguity, activation, intervention lineage, or a richer formation mechanism. This applies only if ERT and CH_RT_CONGRUENCE exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Treat this as an evaluator adapter-equivalence negative control algebraically aliased to CH_RT_CONGRUENCE, not as an independent challenger win or a second simplicity result. It cannot retire full formed-profile ranks, ambiguity, activation, intervention lineage, or a richer formation mechanism. This applies only if ERT and CH_DECLARED_RT_LOOKUP exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only candidate-direction, binding-relation, and fixed-adjudicator readout to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire visit lineage, registered operation relations, or claim equivalent exploration dynamics. This applies only if GTP and CH_GHOST_VISITED_SET_ONLY exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.

Reduce only candidate-direction, binding-relation, and fixed-adjudicator readout to the challenger on this frozen fixture family; do not retire visit lineage, registered operation relations, or claim equivalent exploration dynamics. This applies only if GTP and CH_GHOST_FIXED_BASELINE exact common targets match on all eight fixtures; representation mismatch is CONTRACT_ERROR.
If every G0/GP substantive difference co-occurs with an access/visit difference and at least one substantive difference exists, reduce the account to access/path selection rather than interpretation.
